channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Middle East crisis live: Trump uses expletive-ridden social media post to threaten Iran’s infrastructure - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Middle East crisis live: Trump uses expletive-ridden social media post to threaten Iran’s infrastructure  The Guardian
  2. Iran War Live Updates: Trump Escalates Threats in Truth Social Post After U.S. Rescues Downed Airman  The New York Times
  3. Trump Again Threatens to Bomb Iran's Power Plants If Strait of Hormuz Not Open by Tuesday  time.com
  4. Trump’s expletive-laced Easter message to Iran: Open the strait or ‘you’ll be living in Hell’  ms.now
  5. ‘Unhinged madman’: US politicians react to Trump’s expletive-laden threat to Iran  The Guardian

item.title: On Easter, Pope Leo delivers commanding message of peace to a world at war - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. On Easter, Pope Leo delivers commanding message of peace to a world at war  The Washington Post
  2. Pope Leo XIV calls for peace, urges world leaders to end wars in Easter message  Yahoo
  3. Pope Uses Christianity’s Holiest Day to Take Down Trump  The Daily Beast
  4. Pope: Don’t be paralyzed by mistrust, fear; be catalyzed by Christ to build peace  OSV News
  5. Pope Leo urges peace in first Easter Mass as Christians celebrate in Jerusalem, Gaza and Tehran  Anchorage Daily News

item.title: Pressure mounts on Kanye West to be pulled from his headline role at a summer festival in London - AP News
item.description:
1. Pressure mounts on Kanye West to be pulled from his headline role at a summer festival in London  AP News
  2. Sir Keir Starmer slams Wireless Festival for 'deeply concerning' Kanye West headline gigs after rapper's vile Nazi rants  thesun.co.uk
  3. Pressure grows to remove Kanye West as headliner of London summer music festival  PBS
  4. Pepsi withdraws as UK festival sponsor after Kanye West backlash  BBC
  5. Pepsi Drops Sponsorship of London Music Festival Headlined by Ye  The New York Times

item.title: 3 killed as high winds topple a tree on an Easter egg hunt in Germany - ABC News

item.title: In Lebanon, more than 50 medics have been killed by Israel. Some say they're targeted - npr.org
item.description:
1. In Lebanon, more than 50 medics have been killed by Israel. Some say they're targeted  npr.org
  2. How Israel is destroying healthcare infrastructure in southern Lebanon  Al Jazeera
  3. Without evidence, IDF reiterates Hezbollah uses ambulances for military purposes  Haaretz
  4. Hezbollah uses ambulances, paramedic uniforms, as disguise for terrorism  The Jerusalem Post
  5. Israeli strikes damage hospital in Lebanon’s Tyre; ground invasion advances  MSN

item.title: Backpacks full of explosives found near Serbia-Hungary gas pipeline, leaders say - CNN
item.description:
1. Backpacks full of explosives found near Serbia-Hungary gas pipeline, leaders say  CNN

  4. Explosives found near pipeline that carries Russian gas to Hungary  Reuters
  5. Serbia Finds Explosives at Gas Pipe Near Hungary Before Election  Bloomberg.com

item.title: European allies are losing hope of keeping America in NATO - The Economist
item.description:
1. European allies are losing hope of keeping America in NATO  The Economist
  2. Trump says he might withdraw the U.S. from NATO, even though the law says he can't without Congress' approval  CBS News
  3. Trump roils NATO as pressure builds over Strait of Hormuz  The Hill
  4. Trump trashes NATO but can't quit it, thanks to Rubio | Opinion  USA Today
  5. NATO’s Rutte to meet with Trump at White House amid attacks on alliance  Politico

item.title: Iran hits Israeli industrial zone for third time, strikes critical energy infrastructure across Gulf - The Times of Israel
item.description:
1. Iran hits Israeli industrial zone for third time, strikes critical energy infrastructure across Gulf  The Times of Israel

item.title: Despite the Netanyahu Government's Promises, the IDF Admits It Can't Disarm Hezbollah - Haaretz
item.description:
1. Despite the Netanyahu Government's Promises, the IDF Admits It Can't Disarm Hezbollah  Haaretz

item.title: Kuwait Petroleum Says Headquarters Set Ablaze by Drone Strike - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. Kuwait Petroleum Says Headquarters Set Ablaze by Drone Strike  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Ukraine confirms strikes on Russian oil infrastructure, defying calls to ease attacks amid soaring fuel prices - The Kyiv Independent
item.description:
1. Ukraine confirms strikes on Russian oil infrastructure, defying calls to ease attacks amid soaring fuel prices  The Kyiv Independent

item.description:

item.title: Hungary’s Tisza plans to amend constitution to block Orbán comeback - TVP World
item.description:

item.title: Russia evacuates 198 more staff from Iran's Bushehr nuclear plant, agencies report - Reuters
item.description:

item.title: This is the plan to bring down the Iranian regime - www.israelhayom.com
item.description:
